easy.question: How many times a day should we brush our teeth?
easy.explanation: We should brush our teeth twice a day -- after waking up and before going to bed.

easy.question: The old Indian practice of cleaning teeth using neem or babool twigs is called ______.
easy.explanation: Datun is the traditional Indian practice of using twigs of neem, karanj, or babool trees to clean teeth.

easy.question: When should we wash our hands with soap?
options: Before eating, after using the toilet, and after coming home
easy.answer: Before eating, after using the toilet, and after coming home
easy.explanation: We should wash our hands with soap before eating, after using the toilet, and after coming home from outside.

easy.question: How many hours of sleep does a child need every night?
easy.answer: A child needs at least 8 hours of sleep every night.
easy.explanation: Getting at least 8 hours of sleep every night helps our body and mind rest and grow.

easy.question: Which natural product was used to wash hair in the old days?
easy.explanation: In the old days, people used reetha (soapnut) and shikakai to wash their hair. These are natural products.

medium.question: Name three traditional cleaning methods used in India.
medium.answer: Neem and babool twigs (datun) for cleaning teeth, reetha and shikakai for washing hair, and besan with haldi for cleaning the body.
medium.explanation: Indians have used natural cleaning methods for thousands of years using plants and natural ingredients.

medium.question: How do elephants clean themselves?
options: They spray water on themselves with their trunk
medium.answer: They spray water on themselves with their trunk
medium.explanation: Elephants spray water on themselves with their trunk to clean themselves.

medium.question: Cats lick their ______ to keep it clean.
medium.explanation: Cats lick their fur to keep it clean. Animals also like to stay clean, just like us.

hard.question: Describe a healthy daily routine for a Class 3 student. Include at least five important activities.
hard.answer: A healthy daily routine for a Class 3 student should include: 1) Brush teeth twice a day -- after waking up and before bed. 2) Take a shower every day to keep the body clean. 3) Wash hands with soap before eating, after using the toilet, and after coming home. 4) Eat three healthy meals a day with fruits and vegetables. 5) Drink 6 to 8 glasses of water. 6) Play outside for at least 1 hour. 7) Sleep at least 8 hours every night. 8) Rinse mouth after every meal.
hard.explanation: Following a good routine every day keeps both our body and mind healthy and happy.

hard.question: How did people in India clean themselves in the old days? Compare traditional and modern cleaning methods.
hard.answer: In the old days, Indians used many natural things for cleaning. For teeth, they used neem and babool twigs (datun). For hair, they used reetha (soapnut) and shikakai. For body, they used besan (gram flour) and haldi (turmeric). For clothes, they used soapnut water. For home floors, they used cow dung paste. Today, we use toothbrushes and toothpaste for teeth, shampoo for hair, soap for body, and detergent for clothes. The traditional methods were natural and eco-friendly.
hard.explanation: Traditional Indian cleaning methods used natural ingredients from plants. Many of these methods are still used today and are better for the environment.

easy.question: What happens to our body after running fast?
options: We breathe faster and start sweating
easy.answer: We breathe faster and start sweating
easy.explanation: After running fast, we breathe faster, our cheeks turn red, and we start sweating. This happens because exercise makes our heart work harder.

easy.question: Exercise keeps our heart strong, our muscles healthy, and our ______ sharp.
easy.explanation: Exercise is very good for our body. It keeps our heart strong, muscles healthy, and mind sharp.

easy.question: Which of these is an Indian outdoor game?
easy.explanation: Kabaddi is a popular Indian outdoor game where you tag players while holding your breath.

easy.question: Name three ways to exercise and stay fit.
easy.answer: Running and jumping, skipping rope, and playing outdoor games are ways to exercise and stay fit.
easy.explanation: We can exercise through running, jumping, skipping rope, playing outdoor games, climbing stairs, walking, cycling, and doing yoga.

medium.question: Why is exercise important for our body? What does it do for our heart?
medium.answer: Exercise is important because it keeps our heart strong, muscles healthy, and mind sharp. When we exercise, our heart works harder and becomes stronger. It also helps our body stay fit and full of energy.
medium.explanation: Exercise makes our heart pump faster and stronger. Regular exercise keeps us healthy, happy, and full of energy.

medium.question: Which is a safe place to play?
medium.explanation: A park is a safe place to play because it has open space with no traffic. Busy roads, construction sites, and roofs without railings are unsafe.

medium.question: In the game of Kho-Kho, players ______ and tag other players.
medium.explanation: In Kho-Kho, players chase and tag other players. It is a fun outdoor game that involves a lot of running.

hard.question: Why should we always play in safe places? Give examples of safe and unsafe places to play.
hard.answer: We should always play in safe places to avoid getting hurt. Safe places to play include parks (open space with no traffic), school grounds (meant for children to play), and home gardens. Unsafe places include busy roads (moving vehicles can hurt us), roofs without railings (we could fall off), and construction sites (heavy materials and machines can be dangerous). We should always check if a place is safe before playing there.
hard.explanation: Playing in safe places protects us from accidents and injuries. We should always choose open spaces away from traffic and construction.

easy.question: What should you do if a stranger offers you sweets?
options: Say thank you and eat them
Say 'No, thank you' and walk away
easy.answer: Say 'No, thank you' and walk away
easy.explanation: We should never take sweets or gifts from strangers. We should politely say 'No, thank you' and walk away.

easy.question: Your parents can decide a secret ______ with you, and you should only go with someone who knows it.
easy.explanation: Parents can decide a secret password. Only go with someone who knows this password to stay safe.

easy.question: Name two rules to stay safe from strangers.
easy.answer: Never take sweets or gifts from strangers. Never go with a stranger, even if they say your parents sent them.
easy.explanation: We should be careful around strangers and follow safety rules to protect ourselves.

easy.question: Too much of which activity is bad for our eyes and health?
easy.explanation: Too much screen time (watching TV or using phones) is bad for our eyes and overall health.

medium.question: What is a secret password and how does it help keep children safe?
medium.answer: A secret password is a special word that parents and children decide together. If someone comes to pick up the child, the child should only go with them if they know the password. This helps keep children safe from strangers.
medium.explanation: A secret password is a safety tool that helps children identify trusted adults. Only parents and the child know the password.

medium.question: Why should we eat breakfast every day?
options: It gives energy to start the day
medium.answer: It gives energy to start the day
medium.explanation: Eating breakfast gives us the energy we need to start our day. It helps us focus and learn better at school.

hard.question: Why do both our body and mind need to stay active? Give examples of activities for each.
hard.answer: Both our body and mind need to stay active to be truly healthy. For the body, we should play outdoor games like cricket, kabaddi, and football, skip rope, run, and do yoga. These activities keep our heart strong and muscles healthy. For the mind, we should play games like chess, read books, solve puzzles, and learn new things. Even Harpreet's grandmother, who cannot move much, plays chess to keep her mind active. When we sleep well, eat well, and exercise regularly, both our body and mind stay healthy and happy.
hard.explanation: Being healthy means keeping both the body and mind active. Physical exercise keeps the body fit, while mental activities keep the mind sharp.

hard.question: List five important safety rules for children. Why is it important to follow them?
hard.answer: Five important safety rules for children are: 1) Never take sweets or gifts from strangers. 2) Never go with a stranger, even if they say your parents sent them. 3) Never get into a stranger's car. 4) Always stay with parents or a trusted adult in public places. 5) Play only in safe places like parks and school grounds, not on busy roads or rooftops. It is important to follow these rules because they protect us from danger and keep us safe from harm.
hard.explanation: Safety rules help protect children from dangers. Following them ensures that children stay safe at home, school, and in public places.
